_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: OTP Dialog
_meta.description: This component is an OTP (One-Time Password) verification dialog designed for secure and user-friendly authentication. It allows users to enter a 4-digit OTP sent to their email or phone, shows a live countdown timer indicating when the OTP can be resent, and provides clear feedback messages for success or errors. The layout is compact, responsive, and visually appealing, featuring centered inputs, rounded borders, and distinct buttons for verifying or resending the OTP, making the verification process intuitive and seamless.
